response.original_title: The Boys Finale: Blood and Bone
response.overview: In the explosive final chapter of The Boys, Homelander’s grip over America reaches terrifying new heights while Billy Butcher prepares his last desperate plan to wipe Supes from existence forever. As alliances crumble and the world stands on the brink of collapse, The Boys make one final stand in a brutal showdown that changes everything. Presented as a special one-night-only theatrical 4DX event, the series finale delivers the climactic ending to the Emmy-winning saga.
response.title: The Boys Finale: Blood and Bone
